name: swift-code-reviewer
author: Vinicius Carvalho
description: Comprehensive Swift/SwiftUI code review skill: analyze code quality, architecture, performance, security, and Swift 6+ best practices. Multi-layer review covering SwiftUI patterns, async/await, Sendable conformance, navigation routing, theming, dependency injection, testing, accessibility. Project-aware: reads .claude/CLAUDE.md for custom standards. Provides Critical/High/Medium/Low severity issues with file:line references and actionable feedback.
longDescription:
This skill provides comprehensive code review capabilities for Swift and SwiftUI projects, combining Apple's best practices with project-specific coding standards. It performs multi-layer analysis covering:

• Code Quality: Swift best practices, naming conventions, code organization
• Architecture: Design patterns, dependency injection, separation of concerns
• Performance: Memory management, optimization opportunities, caching strategies
• Security: Authentication, data protection, secure coding patterns
• Testing: Unit tests, integration tests, test organization
• Accessibility: WCAG compliance, VoiceOver support, Dynamic Type
• SwiftUI Patterns: State management, performance optimization, component design
• Concurrency: Actor isolation, MainActor, Sendable conformance, async/await

Features:
- Project-aware: reads .claude/CLAUDE.md and architecture documents
- Four-phase workflow: context gathering, automated analysis, reasoning, recommendations
- Structured feedback with file:line references and code examples
- Integrates with swift-best-practices, swiftui-expert-skill, and related skills
- Supports PR reviews, code audits, and team standards enforcement
triggers: Check if this follows our coding standards

tiers.name: Community
tiers.description: Full access to code review features
